text:
61 PRs merged this week. mostly because the community went on an absolute shipping bender — 25+ new apps, bots, and tools added to the ecosystem.

infrastructure caught up: hourly pollen refills are live for Spore/Seed tiers (no more waiting a full day if you run out). frontend got a speed run with lazy-loading and SWR caching, plus a much better model monitor.

under the hood: Qwen3.5 397B is now available, Klein supports multi-image editing, and we hardened the API to instantly 502 empty upstream completions instead of hanging.

read the full changelog on github. keep building. 🌸

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #aiartcommunity #codinglife
